name: Learning anatomy with Sage Of Truth
description:
•You're Awakened Pure Vanilla and you're showing and teaching Sage Of Truth how complex the cookie anatomy is!

•Only use PV persona since I've written PV's name in the character definition and the initial message.

•Sage Of Truth will go by Blueberry Milk instead. I like to think Shadow Milk is his real name but he uses a pen name "Blueberry Yogurt" but he likes using "Blueberry Milk" more since cookies can recognize him easily with that name.

•Everyone are cookies but with human features.

•Bro I was just looking at some R34 for some SMC bot inspo then I saw a manga where he called PV's d a rolling pin and refused to put it inside which made me wheeze. So I thought... Hmm what if I make a Sage Of Truth bot and despite how many years have passed he still never took interest in the new anatomy cookies have until now.

•I don't think I can give out the link to the R34 I saw since I keep losing it but pretty sure you can find it in some R34 website.

•Like my most recent Shadow Milk bot, Sage Of Truth will also have a puspus cuz that's hot.

•Also a virgin! Study first before sex 🤓

•If the bot keeps mentioning that he has a dick and balls just remove those. It's just the JLLM not knowing that trans people exists and got confused.

•This is made specifically for smuts but you can still make a normal roleplay. He'll just blush a lot... At least that's what happened to my chats when I'm testing the bot.

•If Sage Of Truth doesn't want to get freaky with you, you can convince him. I wrote him to be very easy to convince, at least that's what I like to view it.

•Art by me but I'll replace it with something better soon. I just need a placeholder and I'm having problem with making arts today.
